Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 287898. Jennifer Moss appearing for petitioner for both cases. Charles Wolff appearing for Lawrence Wong. Discovery is not completed. Issue on consolidation of both cases addressed. Matter is referred to the Presiding Judge to set for trial in the Trust case only. Order signed.
In case number 287898, the Will issue can not be resolved until after the trial on the Trust case. Matter is continued to 6/4.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Decleration In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Jennifer Miller Moss, Esq., for Petitioner Lili Silvera
Charles O. Wolff, Esq., for Lawrence Wong

Hearing held and the matter is: Petitioner Lili Silvera, Lorraine Lee, Wyman Lew, Catherine Lew's Motion For Protective Order is denied as it seeks to exclude Pearl Wong from the deposition of Lawrence Wong. However, the court does order that the deposition be noticed to take place in the Discovery Department courtroom on dates to be arranged with the clerk of the Discovery Department. Respondents' request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Continued To Jan-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 287898. Jennifer Moss appearing for petitioner for both cases. Charles Wolff appearing for respondent Lawrence Wong. Mediation was not successful. Trial will take seven days. Discovery is just getting started. Matter is continued to 1/8/07 for status. No appearance if counsel stipulate to have the matter referred to the Presiding Judge for trial setting. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Patty Hubble CSR#3058. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Continued To Aug-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Case called with case no. 287898. Jennifer Moss appearing for petitioner in both cases. Charles Wolff appearing for respondent in both cases. Deposition is pending. Parties want mediation. The matter is too large for pro bono mediation. Court questions why the later will is not filed. Counsel will resolve that issue by the time of the next hearing. Matter is continued to 8/7. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
